📖 How to Operate

Getting Started

Welcome to ABGames! Here's how to use this site:

Playing Games

  • Browse games — Scroll through the game cards on the homepage
  • Click to play — Click any "Play Now" button or game card to launch
  • Live badge — Green "Live" badge means the game is ready to play
  • Coming Soon — Gray badge means the game is under development

Navigating

  • Homepage — Click your browser's back button or close the game tab
  • Switch games — Return to homepage and select a different game
  • Fullscreen — Press F11 in your browser for immersive play

Tips

• Games work best in modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Edge)

• Make sure JavaScript is enabled

• Some games have sound — adjust your volume as needed
